diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
index fb253f0b..91f5973d 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Journal/JobJournalLine.Table.al
@@ -1865,7 +1865,8 @@ table 210 "Job Journal Line"
                    ("Variant Code" <> xRec."Variant Code") or
                    (Quantity <> xRec.Quantity) or
                    ("Unit of Measure Code" <> xRec."Unit of Measure Code") and
-                   (("Applies-to Entry" = 0) and ("Applies-from Entry" = 0))
+                   (("Applies-to Entry" = 0) and ("Applies-from Entry" = 0)) or
+                   IsAmountsCleared()
                 then
                     exit(true);
             Type::Resource:
@@ -1873,11 +1874,12 @@ table 210 "Job Journal Line"
                     IsQuantityChangedForPrice() or
                    ("Work Type Code" <> xRec."Work Type Code") or
                    ("Unit of Measure Code" <> xRec."Unit of Measure Code") or
-                   (("Posting Date" <> xRec."Posting Date") and ("Currency Code" <> ''))
+                   (("Posting Date" <> xRec."Posting Date") and ("Currency Code" <> '')) or
+                   IsAmountsCleared()
                 then
                     exit(true);
             Type::"G/L Account":
-                if ("No." <> xRec."No.") or IsQuantityChangedForPrice() then
+                if ("No." <> xRec."No.") or IsQuantityChangedForPrice() or IsAmountsCleared() then
                     exit(true);
             else
                 exit(false);
@@ -1900,6 +1902,11 @@ table 210 "Job Journal Line"
 #endif
     end;
 
+    local procedure IsAmountsCleared(): Boolean
+    begin
+        exit((Quantity <> 0) and ("Unit Cost" = 0) and ("Unit Price" = 0));
+    end;
+
     procedure UpdateTotalCost()
     begin
         "Total Cost" := Round("Unit Cost" * Quantity, AmountRoundingPrecisionFCY);

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Finance/VAT/Registration/AltCustVATRegDocImpl.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Finance/VAT/Registration/AltCustVATRegDocImpl.Codeunit.al
index da15d9ef..4e7f3a50 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Finance/VAT/Registration/AltCustVATRegDocImpl.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Finance/VAT/Registration/AltCustVATRegDocImpl.Codeunit.al
@@ -92,10 +92,8 @@ codeunit 205 "Alt. Cust. VAT Reg. Doc. Impl." implements "Alt. Cust. VAT Reg. Do
     procedure UpdateSetupOnShipToCountryChangeInSalesHeader(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; xSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
     var
         AltCustVATReg: Record "Alt. Cust. VAT Reg.";
-        VATCustomer: Record Customer;
     begin
-        GetCustVATCalc(VATCustomer, SalesHeader);
-        if AltCustVATRegFacade.GetAlternativeCustVATReg(AltCustVATReg, VATCustomer."No.", SalesHeader."Ship-to Country/Region Code") then
+        if AltCustVATRegFacade.GetAlternativeCustVATReg(AltCustVATReg, SalesHeader."Sell-to Customer No.", SalesHeader."Ship-to Country/Region Code") then
             SalesHeader.Validate("VAT Country/Region Code", AltCustVATReg."VAT Country/Region Code")
         else
             CopyFromCustomer(SalesHeader, xSalesHeader);

index 94cce9d1..899079d6 100644

@@ -43,6 +43,20 @@ codeunit 545 "Send Reminder"

     end;
 
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnAfterIsCustomerAccount', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterIsCustomerAccount(DocumentTableId: Integer; var IsCustomer: Boolean)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            IsCustomer := true;
+    end;
+
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName(DocumentTableId: Integer; var FieldName: Text)
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            FieldName := 'Customer No.';
+    end;
+
     procedure UpdateReminderSentFromUI(var IssuedReminderHeader: Record "Issued Reminder Header")
     var
         SelectedOption: Integer;

             SalesOutstandingAmountFromShipment - InvoicedPrepmtAmountLCY - RetRcdNotInvAmountLCY + AdditionalAmountLCY;
 
         OnAfterGetTotalAmountLCYCommon(Rec, TotalAmountLCY);
